scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @secure-room/api-contract build && pnpm --filter api prisma:generate && pnpm --parallel --filter api --filter client dev
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @secure-room/api-contract build && pnpm --filter api prisma:generate && pnpm --filter api build && pnpm --filter client build
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter api lint && pnpm --filter client lint
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @secure-room/api-contract build && pnpm --filter @secure-room/api-contract test && pnpm --filter api test && pnpm --filter client test
